background: Identify the data types represented by various variables in a given table.

task.query: What is the data type of the variable 'Ratio of a tree's breadth to its height'?
What is the data type of the variable 'Level of trampling on a footpath (low, medium or high)'?
What is the data type of the variable 'Of the invertebrates caught in a trap, the percentage that are herbivorous (plant eating)'?
What is the data type of the variable 'Number of lorries passing a census point within one hour'?
What is the data type of the variable 'Footpath construction (concrete, gravel, none)'?

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
